choices.text: Profit Factor = Gross Profit / Gross Loss. 1.0 breakeven, 1.5+ decent, 2.0+ strong, 3.0+ suspect overfit. Combine with Sharpe + DD + trade count for full picture.
95%+ win rate, Sharpe >3.0, profit factor >4, <30 trades, gains from single winner, one-symbol/one-year. Likely curve-fit; won't generalize. Test out-of-sample + multiple symbols.

questions.explanation: Too-good metrics + small sample = overfit warning.
